product_name: FONENG BL138 True Wireless Earbuds
description:
FONENG BL138 True Wireless Earbuds

The FONENG BL138 Wireless Earbuds feature a 45-degree slant in-ear design for a snug and comfortable fit even after extended use. The touch adjustment feature allows for easy control of playback and calls with a single tap. These FONENG BL138 True Wireless Earbuds provide an exceptional audio experience over the 20Hz-20KHz frequency range, providing crisp and immersive sound with Brass Ring Horn technology. The FONENG Earbuds are made of high-quality PC and silica gel materials, providing both comfort and durability for everyday use. The FONENG BL138 Wireless Earbuds include touch control with one hand and are easy to use. With a finger touch, you may play music, cut it, connect to your phone, and do other things. The FONENG BL138 True Wireless Earbuds provide an easy-to-use Type-C connection for charging. With just one earbud charge, you can listen to music for four or five hours, with an additional twelve hours on standby. Furthermore, the FONENG BL138 Earbuds feature a charge case that adds 250mAh to the battery capacity, allowing for extended on-the-go listening sessions. The connection range is ten meters, allowing you to wander about freely without worrying about signal loss. The FONENG BL138 True Wireless Earbuds, available in elegant black, provide the ultimate wireless music experience.

Bluetooth 5.3 Stable Connectivity

The FONENG BL138 Earbuds have latest Bluetooth 5.3 technology, delivering a reliable connection every time you pair them with your device. Compared to earlier versions, Bluetooth 5.3 provides much quicker data transmission, lower latency, and increased interference resistance, ensuring that music and communications remain clear even in congested areas such as public transport or gyms. Bluetooth 5.3 in the FONENG BL138 Wireless Earbuds helps extend battery life on both the earbuds and your phone due to its improved power efficiency. That means more playtime, less waiting, and a smooth transition between music, video, and calls.

One-Hand Touch Control

The FONENG BL138 Wireless Earbuds have one-handed touch control, making listening easier and more intuitive than ever. No more fiddling with buttons—a gentle tap on the earphones is all it takes to control your music, calls, and voice assistant. With sophisticated touch sensors embedded into each earbud, you can easily play and pause music with a single tap. Answer or end calls immediately. Skip tracks or return with double or triple taps. Turn on your voice assistant (such as Siri or Google Assistant) for hands-free commands. This FONENG BL138 Earbuds feature allows you to stay in control without ever having to take out your phone, making it ideal for multitasking, commuting, working out, or simply relaxing.

product_name: Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds
description:
Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds

The Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds are a powerful blend of cutting-edge technology and sleek design. Designed for those who demand both performance and style, these earbuds offer an array of features that elevate your listening experience to the next level. Whether you're using them for music, calls, or voice assistance, these wireless earbuds promise to deliver high-quality sound and versatile functionality. These earbuds have Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity, which ensures faster transmission, better stability, and reduced latency compared to older versions. This means smoother streaming, improved call quality, and less interference, even in environments with multiple wireless devices. The JL AC7003 chip works in tandem with Bluetooth 5.3 to enhance performance, providing a robust, high-fidelity audio experience that caters to both audiophiles and casual listeners alike.

Impressive Battery Life for Everyday Use

The Hoco EW60 Plus's battery life is a crucial component of wireless headphones. The charging case includes a 300mAh battery, and each earbud has a 30mAh battery. You should be able to use these earphones for the duration of your daily activities. The earphones themselves may be worn constantly for up to four hours on a single charge for lengthy meetings, workouts, or commutes. The charging case significantly extends this by offering many recharges before needing a plug. You can be certain that you'll always have power when you need it thanks to the earbuds' 150-hour backup duration. This extended battery life, combined with the portable design of the charging case, means you won’t need to worry about constantly recharging or running out of power. It’s an ideal feature for travelers or busy professionals who are always on the move and can’t afford downtime in their audio devices.

Active Noise Cancellation and Dual-Device Connectivity

The Hoco EW60 Plus delivers on this front. With its advanced ANC technology, these earbuds block out unwanted ambient noise, allowing you to focus on your music, podcasts, or calls without distractions. Whether you’re in a noisy office, commuting on a train, or walking through a busy city, the ANC feature will keep you immersed in your audio world. The Hoco EW60 Plus supports 2-in-1 functionality, enabling you to connect one earbud to two phones at the same time. This feature is particularly useful for users who manage both personal and work devices simultaneously. You can seamlessly switch between calls or audio from both phones without needing to disconnect and reconnect each time. It’s a truly efficient and convenient feature for multitaskers.

Smart Features for Seamless User Experience

With its noise-cancellation and multi-device connectivity, the Hoco EW60 Plus earbuds come with leader-follower switching, a feature that allows either earbud to function independently. This means you can use either the left or right earbuds as the primary unit, allowing for more flexibility in how you use them, whether you prefer to use just one earbud or both at the same time. description:

The Hoco EW65 True Wireless Earbuds are intended for those that appreciate both performance and convenience in their listening equipment. These EW65 earbuds use Bluetooth version 5.3 and the AC6973 chip to provide a quick, consistent connection with a transmission range of up to 10 meters. They support crucial audio protocols such as Headset, Hands-free, A2DP, and AVRCP, which enable seamless music streaming, phone calls, and media control. The case charges via a simple Type-C interface, allowing for rapid recharges and standby intervals of up to 150 hours. For enhanced functionality, the Hoco EW65 earbuds enable leader-follower switching, allowing you to utilize either earbud separately. They also have simple buttons for music switching, play/pause, and voice assistant activation, putting entire control at your fingertips. When the EW65 earbuds are removed from the case, they automatically power on and pair, and they switch off when they are returned, simplifying the user experience. product_name: Hoco EQ16 ANC+ENC TWS Bluetooth Earbuds
description:
Hoco EQ16 ANC+ENC TWS Bluetooth Earbuds

The Hoco EQ16 ANC+ENC TWS Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds are a clever combination of modern audio technology and user-centric design, intended for consumers who value both sound quality and ease. These EQ16 earbuds use Bluetooth 5.3, driven by the JL AC7003 chip, to provide a fast, reliable, and low-latency connection, delivering a seamless and uninterrupted audio experience whether you're listening to music, making calls, or using voice commands. Each earbud contains of EQ16 a 40mAh battery, which provides up to 7 hours of continuous listening on a single charge. The tiny charging case, which has a capacity of 320mAh, not only protects your earbuds but also allows for numerous recharges, considerably increasing overall listening time. The case is intended for convenience of use, automatically turning on the EQ16 earbud and commencing pairing as soon as they are withdrawn and turning them off when they are returned, making the entire process seamless. The Hoco EQ16 stands out for its dual noise cancellation technology, which combines Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) and Environmental Noise Cancellation (ENC). The ANC feature works by automatically sensing environmental noise, both from outside and within the ear canal, and producing reverse sound waves to cancel it. This helps you to fully immerse yourself in your music without being distracted by the outer world. The ENC function, on the other hand, improves the intelligibility of your calls by combining sound and noise reduction techniques. The Hoco EQ16 earbud are also quite adaptable, with a 2-in-1 capability that allows them to connect to two mobile phones at once. This function is especially handy for individuals who manage many devices, since it allows you to move between calls and media without disconnecting. The master-slave switching option increases the versatility by allowing you to utilize either earbud separately while keeping full functioning. For increased convenience, these earbuds offer voice assistant activation, allowing you to summon Siri or other voice assistants with a single tap. The simple touch controls allow you to easily switch tracks, play or stop music, and manage calls without having to reach for your phone. This hands-free feature is excellent for folks on the go, whether they're commuting, exercising, or simply multitasking. The Hoco EQ16 earbuds are designed to be both elegant and ergonomic, providing a pleasant fit for longer usage. The elegant charging case not only protects and charges the earbuds , but it also slips conveniently into your pocket or purse, making them ideal for everyday usage.

product_name: OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro (Global Version)
description:
OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro

The OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro are premium TWS earbuds designed for users who demand exceptional audio quality and smart features. With powerful 12.4mm dynamic drivers, triple-mic call noise cancellation, and up to 49dB hybrid active noise cancellation, they deliver immersive sound and crystal-clear communication. Bluetooth 5.4, dual-device pairing, and Google Fast Pair ensure seamless connectivity across Android and iOS devices, while BassWave enhancement, a six-band EQ, and preset audio profiles available via the HeyMelody app allow for deep sound personalization. OnePlus 3D Audio adds spatial depth for compatible OnePlus devices, elevating the overall listening experience. Whether you're seeking noise-canceling earbuds for Android, quick charging for on-the-go use, or workout-friendly earbuds with sweat and dust resistance, the IP55-rated Nord Buds 3 Pro hit the mark. They offer up to 12 hours of playback without ANC, 44 hours with the charging case, and an ultra-fast charge that gives up to 11 hours of use in just 10 minutes. Lightweight, stylish, and feature-packed, these earbuds stand out as one of the most compelling value-driven options in the OnePlus lineup.

Noise Cancellation: Silence When You Need It Most
The Nord Buds 3 Pro successfully blocks out background noise with up to 49 dB of hybrid active noise cancellation, enabling you to listen to music uninterrupted. This clever noise-canceling device, which has a 4,000 Hz frequency range and dynamically adapts to surrounding sound environments, combines feedforward and feedback noise reduction. This adaptive noise reduction guarantees a quiet and engrossing audio experience whether you're resting or commuting.

Enhanced Call Clarity

The Nord Buds 3 Pro earbuds Stay connected with crystal-clear voice quality using the Clear Call algorithm. Each earbud contains three mics (two analog and one digital) that work with noise cancellation and an anti-wind noise algorithm to capture your voice while filtering out noisy backgrounds.

Powerful Audio Performance with “Titanized” Drivers

The Nord Buds 3 Pro features a titanium-coated 12.4mm driver for enhanced audio performance, producing richer bass, clear vocals, and balanced sound quality. Basswave 2.0 further amplifies the bass for dynamic, head-nodding tracks, creating a powerful, concert-like experience.

Extended Battery Life and Quick Charging

The Nord Buds 3 Pro earbuds have an impressive 44-hour battery life and are intended for prolonged playback. You can keep your music playing all day long with just 10 minutes of quick charging, which will give you 11 more hours of playback even when your battery is getting low.

Stable Connectivity and Smart Device Pairing

The Nord Buds 3 Pro provides a steady connection thanks to Bluetooth 5.4, and switching between devices is simple thanks to dual device connectivity. You can easily switch back to streaming on your tablet after taking calls on your phone. Google Fast Pair allows for quick Android connection, while the HeyMelody app gives non-OnePlus users access to other capabilities including a "Find My Earbuds" feature that helps them find missing earbuds.

product_name: Realme Buds Air 7
description:
Realme Buds Air 7 True Wireless Earbuds

The Realme Buds Air 7 True Wireless Earbuds combine high-resolution audio, advanced noise cancellation, and long battery life in a sleek and durable design. Powered by 12.4mm dynamic bass drivers and supporting the LHDC 5.0 codec, they deliver rich, detailed sound that brings your music to life. The Smart Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) technology reduces noise by up to 52dB, ensuring an immersive listening experience even in busy environments. Equipped with Bluetooth 5.4, 45ms ultra-low latency, and 360° Spatial Audio, these earbuds are perfect for music lovers and gamers who demand flawless, lag-free performance. With IP55 water and dust resistance, the Buds Air 7 can handle workouts, outdoor activities, and daily use with ease. Enjoy up to 13 hours of playback on a single charge (52 hours with the case) and quick charge support that provides 10 hours of playtime with just 10 minutes of charging.

Key Features of Realme Buds Air 7

12.4mm Dynamic Bass Drivers: Delivers high-resolution sound with deep bass and clear details.
LHDC 5.0 Codec Support: Ensures Hi-Res audio quality for an immersive experience.
Smart ANC up to 52dB: Blocks out surrounding noise for distraction-free listening.
Six-Microphone ENC: AI-powered noise reduction ensures crystal-clear calls.
Bluetooth 5.4 with 45ms Low Latency: Ideal for gaming and smooth media streaming.
360° Spatial Audio: Creates a theater-like surround sound experience.
Long Battery Life: Up to 13 hours per charge and 52 hours with the charging case.
Fast Charging: 10 minutes of charging delivers up to 10 hours of playtime.
IP55 Water & Dust Resistance: Durable design for workouts and outdoor use.
Smart Touch Controls & Google Fast Pair: Quick pairing and easy music control.

Performance & Sound Technology

The Realme Buds Air 7 uses 12.4mm dynamic drivers with LHDC 5.0 for high-resolution audio. The 360° Spatial Audio feature adds depth to your music and movies, while 45ms low latency ensures that gaming and video streaming stay in perfect sync.

Active Noise Cancellation (ANC)

The Realme Buds Air 7 has greater Active Noise Cancellation up to 52dB, making it one of the strongest ANC performers in its class. Powered by Realme's Intelligent Deep Sea Noise Reduction 3.0, the earbuds recognize and adapt to various noise settings, whether you are on a packed street, in a crowded metro, or in a noisy office. Furthermore, the Buds Air 7 employ a six-microphone configuration (three on each earbud) to not only support hybrid ANC but also improve AI-powered Environmental Noise Cancellation (ENC) during calls.

Battery Life & Charging

Another outstanding aspect of the Realme Buds Air 7 is their battery life. The earbuds provide up to 13 hours of playback duration without ANC and around 7.5 hours with ANC enabled. When paired with the charging case, users may enjoy up to 52 hours of total playback without ANC and approximately 30 hours with ANC turned on, which is enough to span several days of usual use. The earbuds also feature quick charging, providing 10 hours of listening after just 10 minutes of charge. This quick top-up capability makes them ideal for consumers on the go who do not want to wait for electricity.

product_name: Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5
description:
Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5

The Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 is an excellent addition to the category of truly wireless earbuds. These TWS earbuds have the most recent Bluetooth V5.3 chip, ensuring a stable and efficient wireless connection with your devices. The sophisticated chipset provides increased connection and energy efficiency, allowing you to enjoy prolonged usage without the need for regular recharging. The Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 stands out for its remarkable noise-cancelling capabilities. These Redmi Buds 5 earbuds use cutting-edge technology to suppress ambient noise by up to 46 decibels, giving you a peaceful and undisturbed listening experience even during hectic commutes or crowded office situations. These Redmi Buds 5 earbuds provide excellent audio quality. The Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 include a big 12.4mm dynamic driver with a moving coil architecture and produce amazing sound quality. Immerse yourself in rich, immersive music with deep bass, clean mids, and sharp highs, guaranteeing an exceptional listening experience each time. These Buds 5 earbuds allow you to tailor your audio experience with four distinct EQ sound profiles. Whether you want more bass, a balanced audio output, or a sound profile suited to your music or activities, the Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 have you covered. But the quality doesn't end there; with AI Call technology, these earbuds provide crystal-clear and natural speech transmission during phone conversations, even in tough circumstances. Whether it's work-related calls or personal talks, the Xiaomi Redmi Buds 5 are the ideal partner for remaining connected with clarity and ease.

Up to 46dB Wide ANC

The Redmi Buds 5 have a noise reduction depth of up to 46dB*, making them excellent for reducing low-frequency noise in aircraft cabins or on subways. Put them in and enjoy your own place.

2-microphone AI-based ANC For Calls

The Redmi Buds 5 uses a self-developed dual-channel AI system to withstand noise created by a 6m/s wind. The two microphones work together to precisely extract speech sounds and filter out extraneous noise, giving the impression that you're speaking with the person on the phone face to face.

Ultra-large Driver With Titanium Diaphragm

The 12.4mm big dynamic driver of Redmi Buds 5 allows for a wider vibration area and deeper rhythms, while the robust and strong titanium-plated diaphragm delivers cleaner treble performance. Listen to the string squeaks and breathes between phrases; superb acoustics bring the music to life.

A Vast Soundstage

The Redmi Buds 5's separate sound chamber provides great dynamic frequency response and sound constancy, resulting in a more realistic and immersive experience with discrete layers of high, mid, and low-frequency sounds.

Classic Earbuds Design For a Snug Fit

Classic design with a modern twist. The Redmi Buds 5 are optimized utilizing data modeling of hundreds of ear canal models to provide a solid fit while remaining comfortable. Redmi Buds 5 has a 65:35 inner and outer weight distribution, which allows for a better fit.

Neumann NDH 30 Open-Back Studio Headphone

The Neumann NDH 30 Open-Back Studio Headphone is precisely designed to provide the most accurate and natural sound reproduction possible, making it an excellent choice for essential listening jobs, including mixing, mastering, and high-precision editing. The NDH 30 has a dynamic open-back acoustic design and uses 38 mm neodymium transducers shielded by a cloth-covered grille to create an ultra-wide frequency response of 12 Hz to 34,000 Hz, guaranteeing every nuance of the audio spectrum is presented with lifelike clarity. With a nominal impedance of 120 ohms and a sensitivity of 104 dB SPL at 1 kHz/1 Vrms, this headset is designed to deliver strong, clear sound while keeping distortion levels at 0.03% even at 100 dB SPL. Its maximum input handling of 1000 mW and continuous power handling of 200 mW provide longevity in demanding professional applications. The NDH 30 is designed for comfort and robustness, with a durable yet lightweight headband made of spring steel strip, aluminum, and high-quality plastic fittings that provide stability throughout lengthy sessions. The circumaural ear cups are entirely composed of aluminum and have replaceable cloth-covered foam earpads for prolonged product life and greater wearing comfort. They also have an ideal ear cup pressure range of 5.5 to 6.8 N. The NDH 30 is foldable for easy portability and connects through a detachable, single-sided cable featuring a 3.5 mm (1/8") TRS plug and an included 6.3 mm (1/4") adapter, with a generous cable length of 3 meters (10 feet) to accommodate studio mobility. Internally balanced to minimize channel crosstalk, the NDH 30 ensures outstanding stereo imaging, offering razor-sharp localization and remarkable depth perception, making it ideal for immersive content creation, binaural mixes, and VR applications. Beyond its technical prowess, it embodies Neumann’s philosophy of providing a portable version of the reference-grade sound typically associated with their studio monitors, perfectly matching systems calibrated via the Neumann MA 1 Automatic Monitor Alignment. Finished in an elegant Black Edition, the NDH 30 not only excels in sonic performance but also meets professional demands for durability and environmental resilience, operating reliably between +5°C and +45°C and capable of being stored between -15°C and +70°C without compromise. Compact at dimensions of 245 x 255 x 84 mm and weighing 0.97 kg with packaging, the NDH 30 is the definitive portable reference tool for modern audio professionals seeking uncompromising linearity, transient precision, and consistency across all listening environments.

Excellent monitoring in Neumann Excellence

The goal of the NDH 30 was to make the reference sound of a Neumann studio monitor system, fully calibrated by MA-1, available anywhere in the form of an easily transportable headphone. Simultaneously, the NDH 30 establishes its sound reference for headphone reproduction, which is critical to customer success. The NDH 30 is the preferred choice for mixing and mastering because of its exceptional sound qualities. It is also suited to high-precision editing because of its superior long-term comfort. Its high-quality construction of spring steel and aluminum, as well as its comfortable handling characteristics, are substantially identical to those of the NDH 20. The NDH 30 is an open-back headphone, which means its dynamic 38 mm transducers function as acoustic dipoles. This enables their highly honed sound qualities to shine through: incredibly rapid transient response, dry bass, uncolored mids, and clear highs. In other words, the NDH 30 does not use sound coloring and instead reproduces the signal exactly.

The Handheld Sound Reference

The NDH 30 is a premium, circumaural open-back headphone that promises to take your music experience to new heights. The NDH 30 excels at producing fine detail resolution and high-precision stereo images. Its open-back design produces a natural and spacious soundstage, allowing for precise localization of each element in the mix. The NDH 30 is designed for the most demanding applications, with great transient response, making it an excellent choice for professional audio jobs including mixing, mastering, and critical listening. The headphones have a linear frequency response, which ensures the most precise and true representation of sound without coloring. Whether you are in the studio or working remotely, the NDH 30 provides a reference-quality listening experience, with accuracy and clarity on every note.

description:
Beyerdynamic DT 990 Pro Open-back Studio Headphone

These open-back studio headphones are a reliable tool for any sound enthusiast. The wide stereo image and three-dimensional sound reproduction make the beyerdynamic DT 990 PRO headphones a loyal companion for producers. Outstanding tonal depth ensures that even small changes in the positioning of the acoustic source can be perceived while mixing. For decades now, professional users all around the world have placed their trust in our classic range: DT 770/880/990 PRO. These benchmark-setting studio headphones, available in three different models, boast extremely detailed resolution and very transparent sound. The circumaural headphones with their open-back design provide exceptional spaciousness and detailed tonal depth. Their mild bass and treble boost ensures a pleasant sound. The bass is not overstated but rather precise and the treble boost is powerfully present without sounding sharp. The single-sided cable allows the headphones to be put on and taken off frequently without cables getting tangled, and soft, adjustable ear cups provide for added comfort. The revised folding case allows for quick and efficient storage, fitting neatly into your backpack when not in use. Furthermore, the Quick Access function allows you to connect your wireless headphones to your favorite music streaming services with only a few clicks, without having to reach for your phone. The WH-1000XM5 headphones change the laws of distraction-free listening. Two processors handle eight microphones, providing remarkable noise cancellation and call quality. The WH-1000XM5 headphones include a freshly designed driver, DSEE - Extreme, and Hi-Res audio capability, and they give incredible audio quality.

Industry-leading noise cancellation

From airport noise to people's voices, our WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones with 8 noise cancellation microphones block out more high and mid frequency noises than before. With the new Auto NC Optimizer, noise cancellation is automatically tuned based on your wearing conditions and surroundings.

The WH-1000XM5 employs new sensors and spatial sound technologies to provide immersive sound for augmented reality games such as Niantic's "Ingress"11,12. When playing "Ingress" with the WH-1000XM5, sensor and spatial sound technologies provide a unique experience: utilizing head tracking, sound is sent from various angles to exactly match the action on the screen.

Crystal Clear hands-free calling

Precise Voice Pickup Technology and powerful audio signal processing ensure that the person on the other end of the call can clearly hear your voice, even in busy settings. Our noise reduction system was built using AI machine learning utilizing over 500 million speech samples to suppress ambient noise and extract your voice clearly in a variety of scenarios.

High-Resolution Audio with and without wires

The WH-1000XM5 offers both High-Resolution Audio and High-Resolution Audio Wireless, due to LDAC, our industry-standard audio coding technology. LDAC transfers around three times more data2 than traditional Bluetooth audio, resulting in outstanding High-Resolution Audio quality.

4 Microphones to Focused on Your Voice

The WH-1000XM5 headphones include four beamforming microphones and are optimized to pick up only your voice. They can capture every single syllable thanks to an increased signal-to-noise ratio, even when there is a lot of noise.

product_name: Logitech Zone 300 Wireless Bluetooth Headphone
description:
Logitech Zone 300 Wireless Bluetooth Headphone

The Logitech Zone 300 Wireless Headphone is precisely designed to improve audio quality and communication clarity, making it an excellent choice for both professionals and music aficionados. These headphones include two beamforming microphones and innovative noise-canceling algorithms, which work together to reduce ambient noise and guarantee that your speech is conveyed with remarkable clarity during conversations. The headphones are built with adjustable frequency responses to meet a variety of audio demands. In conversation mode, they have a frequency response range of 100-7KHz, which ensures clean and realistic voice reproduction. In music mode, the frequency response ranges from 50 to 20KHz, providing a rich, full-spectrum audio experience that captures the intricacies of your favorite songs. The 30 mm drivers produce a powerful and immersive sound, while the sensitivity of 96dB ±3dB 1kHz assures strong and clear audio output. Logitech Zone 300 complies with the EN 50332-2 standard, which means it follows audio safety rules to preserve your hearing during extended usage. The built-in lithium-ion battery offers long-lasting performance and allows you to roam freely without being attached by cords. This wireless simplicity, along with the Zone 300's lightweight and comfy design, makes it ideal for extended usage throughout the day, whether you're in a business meeting, listening to music, or playing games.

Stay Connected

Switch seamlessly between PC and smartphone with Zone 300 headphone. Multipoint Bluetooth allows you to pair up to six devices and connect to two at the same time. Move freely around your house or business and stay consistently connected, even from 30 meters away.

All Day Battery Life

Get up to 20 hours of listening time and 16 hours of speaking time on a full charge. Battery life may vary depending on the user and computer environment. A 5-minute rapid charge of Logitech Zone 300 allows for up to an hour of conversation time.

More Recycled Material

Logitech is dedicated to building a more sustainable future. Zone 300's plastic pieces are constructed of up to 55% post-consumer recycled plastic. Zone 300's plastic content: Rose and Off-white use 42% recycled plastic, whereas Black uses 55%, omitting printed wiring assemblies (PWA), cables, and packaging. By carefully selecting components like batteries and magnets and reworking the circuit board, we were able to minimize an estimated 1 kg CO₂e per product, comparable to charging a smartphone 122 times.

Customize the Experience with Logi Tune

Logi Tune lets you manage your music and meeting experience. The Logi Tune13 of Logitech Zone 300 allows you to customize your audio experience by adjusting the sidetone, mic level, and EQ.Logi Tune is available for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android. Logi Tune is a desktop and mobile app for Logitech headsets available at logitech.com/tune, the Apple App Store, and the Google Play store. Plus, keep your gadgets up to date and attend meetings with a single click.

product_name: Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface
description:
Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface

The Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface is a luxurious desktop solution that complements Neumann's world-class studio microphones, KH series speakers, and NDH headphones. The Neumann MT 48 U Audio Interface has high-precision AD converters that produce an incredible 136dB dynamic range while supporting resolutions of up to 24-bit/192kHz for unrivaled reference-quality sound. This Neumann Audio Interface features two ultra-low-noise mic preamps with up to 78dB of gain and two line/instrument inputs that capture every sound element with astounding clarity. The Neumann MT 48 U has four analog outputs (2 x XLR, 2 x 1/4" TRS) and two superior headphone outputs, ensuring faultless monitoring and easy outboard gear interfacing. The Neumann MT 48 U Audio Interface, which includes advanced DSP processing such as a fully parametric 4-band EQ, dynamics processor, and studio-grade reverb, provides direct control over four separate monitor mixes, all accessible via an intuitive touchscreen interface with built-in talkback functionality. The Neumann MT 48 U USB-C/Dante audio interface smoothly integrates into current, networked studio setups, providing broad digital connections like as ADAT, S/PDIF, Dante, and AES67, as well as Ethernet capability. The machine also includes MIDI I/O (via 1/4" TRS with adaptor supplied separately), which increases its flexibility. It is compatible with both Mac (macOS 10.15-13) and Windows (Windows 10 64-bit or later), operating via USB 2.0 via a Type-C connection and powered by an integrated universal 9V-15V DC converter with US and EU plugs. The Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface, which measures 7.87" x 5.03" x 1.57" and weighs 2.09 lbs, combines Neumann's famed audio brilliance with next-generation control in a compact, powerful package.

description:
Audio Technica ATH-M50xBT2 Wireless Over-Ear Headphone

The Audio Technica ATH-M50xBT2 is the second-generation wireless over-ear headphone that brings the legendary M50x studio sound to a versatile Bluetooth design. Combining exceptional audio quality with modern wireless convenience, these headphones offer up to 50 hours of battery life, improved call quality, and a host of user-friendly features for both audio professionals and music enthusiasts.

Legendary Studio Sound on the Go

The ATH-M50xBT2 delivers the critically acclaimed sonic signature of the original M50x studio headphones in a wireless format. Equipped with proprietary 45mm large-aperture drivers and a dedicated amplifier, these headphones provide exceptional clarity across an extended frequency range, complete with deep, accurate bass response. Dual mics and beamforming technology ensure crystal-clear call quality, while sidetone circuitry allows you to hear your own voice during calls for more natural conversations. The multipoint pairing function enables connection to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously, and the low latency mode improves audio-video synchronization for smooth streaming and gaming. With support for voice assistants like Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, and Siri, these headphones offer seamless integration with your digital life.

Customizable Experience and Lasting Comfort

The ATH-M50xBT2 is designed for personalized, long-lasting comfort. The A-T Connect app allows users to activate low latency mode, adjust EQ settings, change L/R volume balance, and even locate misplaced headphones. The professional-grade earpad and headband material ensure durability and comfort during extended listening sessions. With up to 50 hours of continuous use on a full charge and the option for a wired connection, these headphones adapt to your lifestyle, whether you're commuting, working, or simply enjoying your favorite music.

product_name: Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone (Official)
description:
Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Canceling Wireless Headphone (Official)

The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone is a premium audio solution that delivers immersive sound, crystal-clear calls, and industry-leading noise reduction. With 12 built-in microphones, it provides precise noise reduction using innovative technologies such as the Adaptive NC Optimizer and Personal NC Optimizer, which change automatically to your environment. The Sony Wireless Headphones enable 360 Spatial Sound Personalizer for a more personalized listening experience and provide high-resolution audio both connected and wirelessly. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone is a foldable, over-ear design with ultra-soft padding, making it both comfortable and portable. Bluetooth 5.3 provides robust, low-latency communication over a range of up to 10 meters. SBC, AAC, LDAC, and LC3 audio formats are all supported, providing flexibility and interoperability with a wide range of devices. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone has an impressive battery life, providing up to 30 hours of audio playback with noise cancellation turned on and up to 40 hours without it. You can chat for up to 24 hours with noise cancelling active and up to 28 hours without. Charging is done via USB, and the lithium battery provides long-term power reliability. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Headphone features a 30mm neodymium driver with a frequency response of 4 Hz to 40,000 Hz, resulting in powerful bass and clear highs. Other features include ambient sound mode, rapid attention, and SCMS-T content security. Bluetooth profiles supported include A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, HSP, TMAP, and PBP, which allow broad interoperability with smartphones, tablets, and other devices. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones are ideal for both audiophiles and daily users, thanks to their clever features, adaptive noise control, and superb music quality.

Noise Cancellation With Adaptive Microphone System

The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone has a powerful processors and an adaptive microphone system; noise cancellation is optimized in real time—so your world remains undisturbed and your sound remains pure. With seven times quicker processing speeds than its predecessor, the HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3 fine-tunes 12 microphones in real-time, resulting in a significant improvement in noise cancellation, sound quality, and call clarity. Noise cancellation adapts more precisely to your fit and environment when microphones are placed appropriately, resulting in effortless and powerful sound.

360 Spatial Sound Personalizer

With the Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones, you can enjoy a thrilling Dolby Atmos experience as well as 360 Spatial Sound that adapts to your ears. With the Sony 360 Spatial Sound Personalizer app, you will get a sound experience tailored to you. When coupled with BRAVIA XR TVs, the software detects and analyzes your ear shape, allowing these headphones to generate your spatial sound environment.

High-Resolution Audio

The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone offers both High-Resolution Audio and High-Resolution Audio Wireless, due to LDAC, our industry-standard audio coding technology. LDAC delivers around three times as much data as normal Bluetooth audio, resulting in outstanding High-Resolution Audio quality. DSEE Extreme utilizes Edge-AI (Artificial Intelligence) to upscale compressed digital audio files in real time. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone dynamically recognises instruments, musical genres, and specific song elements, restoring high-range sound lost during compression.

Ultra-clear calls

Intelligent beamforming isolates your speech from surrounding noise, ensuring that you are always heard—even when others are speaking. Do it immediately, right from your headphones. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone uses a six-microphone AI-based beamforming system to focus on your speech while filtering out surrounding noise, ensuring that every word is heard clearly and sharply, even in hectic environments.

Foldable design

The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone is designed with precision, and its folding mechanism use modern metal injection processes for a seamless, robust fold, resulting in a design that is both refined and resilient. Designed to fit perfectly into bags and aircraft pockets, the tiny case now has a magnetic closure for simple access, ensuring that your headphones are always ready to go.

Synco G3 Compact Dual Wireless Microphone System

With the Synco G3, content makers may greatly increase the versatility of their audio setup. To improve the interactive audio environment, Synco G3 uses the 2-way communication system in conjunction with the receiver and transmitters (the 3-channel recording system) to converse and record sounds in real-time up to a maximum distance of 250 meters.

Three Outputs for All Devices

Synco G3 can connect to cameras, mobile devices, and computers with the receiver features of three USB-C digital, TRRS, and TRS outputs. This allows the podcaster to simultaneously distribute findings to three distinct platforms.

product_name: FUJIFILM X-S20 Mirrorless Camera (Only Body)
description:
FUJIFILM X-S20 Mirrorless Camera (Only Body)

The FUJIFILM X-S20 has X-Processor with 5 imaging engine and the 26.1-megapixel X Trans CMOS 4 sensor work together to produce fast picture and video processing, better AF speed and accuracy, FUJIFILM's well recognized color science, and five-axis in-body image stabilization up to seven stops. The FUJIFILM X-S20 is an excellent video camera with a Vlog mode that allows you to shoot high-quality film while making simple touchscreen tweaks. The X-S20 camera's focusing mechanism is customized for the best possible content creation with the Product Priority and Background Defocus modes. With two 3.5mm jacks—one for an external microphone and the other for headphones—the camera's stunning visuals may be accompanied with music of the highest caliber. High-quality broadcasting may be accessed via a USB-C connector for 4K at 60 frames per second and Full HD streaming, and external devices can capture raw video via the micro-HDMI output. The X-S20 has a sleek, user-friendly design that contributes to its smooth handling and effective shooting. The camera has more noticeable buttons and bigger dials. The FUJIFILM X-S20 also has a rear 3.0" 1.84m-dot touchscreen LCD with a vari-angle design that allows it to be used from high, low, and front-facing angles. It also has a brilliant 2.36m-dot electronic viewfinder. The camera supports Wi-Fi and Bluetooth wireless connections and features a USB-C connector for tethering and other digital interfaces. You may view and transfer photographs, watch Live View on the camera, and control the camera remotely with the exclusive FUJIFILM XApp. Longer shooting durations are provided by the rechargeable lithium-ion NP-W235 battery, partly because of the processor's increased efficiency.

26.1MP APS-C X-Trans BSI CMOS 4 Sensor and X-Processor 5

The FUJIFILM X-S20 combines the X-Trans CMOS 4 sensor, which is a flexible and well-reliable 26.1MP APS-C format sensor, with the X-Processor 5, which enables the camera to produce its smooth tones and colors at a faster rate for an extended period of time. The in-body image stabilization significantly enhances the wide native sensitivity range of ISO 160-12800 and the increased low-light performance. Because it is an X-Trans sensor, it also uses a randomized pixel array, which eliminates the need for an optical low-pass filter and results in very crisp and high-quality images.

6K, 4K, and Full HD Video Recording

A wide range of video features are also available with the X-S20, such as internal 6K recording at up to 30 frames per second and Full HD recording at up to 240 frames per second for very slow-motion viewing. The X-Processor 5's speed significantly improves overall video performance by allowing for quick read rates during video recording and assisting in the reduction of rolling shutter distortion while capturing moving subjects. The FUJIFILM X-S20 camera has a 3.5mm microphone jack for more sophisticated audio recording and another 3.5mm headphone jack for audio monitoring. It also has a micro-HDMI port that allows 12-bit 4:2:2 recording to an optional external recorder for better quality.

User-Friendly Video Modes

The FUJIFILM X-S20 has several shooting modes designed to meet various requirements. The camera's mode dial now has a new Vlog mode that makes it simple to change the camera's settings while filming movies by using the touchscreen. Product Priority mode is great for unpacking or product videos since it automatically shifts the emphasis from your face to the object in front of you. With only a few clicks, you can get that dramatic appearance by blurring away the backdrop using the backdrop Defocus setting.

Improved Autofocus

Its subject-detection AF, powered by the X-Processor 5 and Deep-Learning AI Technology, follows and recognizes human faces and eyes in addition to a variety of other subjects, like as animals, birds, automobiles, motorbikes, and even drones. Additionally, the FUJIFILM X-S20 has a better auto-focus prediction algorithm that ensures steady focusing even while shooting continually moving subjects. This is especially useful in low-contrast and Zone AF scenarios. The FUJIFILM X-S20 camera's AUTO mode combines subject recognition and focusing to keep everything crisp so you never miss a critical moment and can compose and create with confidence.

description:
SoundPEATS Opera 05

The SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds are a flagship offering in the brand’s high-fidelity lineup, designed for users who demand immersive audio and cutting-edge features. These SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds feature a powerful triple-driver hybrid setup a large 12mm dynamic driver paired with dual balanced armature drivers delivering rich bass, detailed mids, and crisp highs for a truly dynamic listening experience.

Certified for Hi-Res Audio Wireless and equipped with LDAC codec support, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 Bluetooth Earbuds offer studio-grade sound over Bluetooth 5.3, ensuring stable transmission and low latency. Whether you're streaming music, gaming, or taking calls, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds deliver clarity and depth that rival wired headphones.

Advanced features like adaptive active noise cancellation (ANC) up to 30dB and Transparency Mode allow you to control your sound environment with ease. With up to 9 hours of playback per charge and 33 hours total with the charging case, these SoundPEATS earbuds are built for all-day use. The sleek design includes touch controls, IPX4 water resistance, and a premium finish with gold accents for a stylish, durable look.

Compatible with the SoundPEATS app, users can customize EQ settings, update firmware, and fine-tune controls to match their preferences. Triple-Driver Hybrid Setup: Combines 12mm dynamic driver with dual balanced armature drivers for rich, detailed sound
Hi-Res Audio Wireless Certified: Supports LDAC codec for near-lossless audio over Bluetooth
Bluetooth 5.3: Ensures stable, low-latency connection across devices
Adaptive ANC: Reduces ambient noise up to 30dB for immersive listening
Dual Mic ENC: Enhances call clarity by filtering out background noise
Transparency Mode: Lets in ambient sound for situational awareness

Touch Controls: Easy access to playback, calls, ANC, and voice assistant
App Support: Customize EQ, update firmware, and control features via SoundPEATS app
IPX4 Water Resistance: Protects against sweat and splashes for active use
LDAC Audio Codec

The SoundPEATS Opera 05 Bluetooth Earbuds support the LDAC audio codec, enabling transmission of high-resolution audio over Bluetooth at up to 990 kbps. This means you get richer detail, deeper bass, and clearer highs perfect for audiophiles who want near-lossless sound without the wires. Combined with Hi-Res Audio Wireless certification, these SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds deliver studio-grade performance on the go.

Block Noise, Stay Clear with ANC and Dual Mic ENC

Equipped with adaptive active noise cancellation (ANC) up to 30dB, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds effectively reduce ambient distractions like traffic, chatter, or wind. For calls, the dual-mic ENC (Environmental Noise Cancellation) system isolates your voice and filters out background noise, ensuring crystal-clear communication even in noisy environments. Whether you're commuting or working remotely, these SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds keep your audio focused and uninterrupted.

IPX4 Water Resistance

The SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds feature IPX4 water resistance, making them splash-proof and sweat-resistant ideal for workouts, light rain, or everyday use. This added durability ensures your earbuds stay protected during active routines, giving you peace of mind whether you're at the gym or on the move.

A: They feature a triple-driver hybrid setup with LDAC support and Hi-Res Audio Wireless certification for premium sound quality.

Q2: How long does the battery last?
A: You get up to 9 hours of playback on a single charge, and up to 33 hours total with the charging case.

Q3: Do the SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds support noise cancellation?
A: Yes, they offer adaptive ANC up to 30dB and dual-mic ENC for clear calls in noisy environments.

Q4: Are these earbuds water-resistant?
A: Yes, they have an IPX4 rating, making them resistant to sweat and light splashes.

Q5: Can I customize sound settings?
A: Absolutely. The SoundPEATS app lets you adjust EQ, toggle ANC modes, and update firmware.

Q6: What Bluetooth version do they use?
A: These SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds use Bluetooth 5.3 for faster pairing and stable connectivity.

Q7: Are the SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds compatible with iOS and Android?
A: Yes, SoundPEATS Opera 05 work seamlessly with both iOS and Android devices via Bluetooth.

product_name: Universal Audio Volt 276 USB-C Audio Interface
description:
Universal Audio Volt 276 USB-C Audio Interface

The Universal Audio Volt 276 takes use of UA's legendary analog expertise to create a USB-C audio interface befitting of a decades-long reputation. The Volt 276 has first-rate analog circuitry as well as class-leading 24-bit/192kHz AD/DA conversion, allowing you to produce professional-sounding music productions, live streaming, and podcasts. This bus-powered audio interface has two microphone preamplifiers, switchable 610-style analog sound, and input metering. The crown gem of this interface, however, is its built-in 1176-derived FET compressor with three push-button application modes. Aside from that, dual analog outputs and a headphones output make monitoring a breeze, and direct monitoring is available for zero-latency operation. In addition, you have MIDI I/O for your synthesizers and controllers. The Volt 276 vaunts a rugged, retro-inspired industrial design and comes with a cutting-edge native software bundle.

Armed with class-leading AD/DA conversion

The Universal Audio Volt 276 has excellent AD/DA conversion, which is a must-have feature for professional-sounding recordings. This enhanced conversion circuitry provides full 24-bit/192kHz performance, delivering true-to-life detail and clarity with a high degree of dimensionality. Sweetwater experts have discovered that projects produced with this USB-C audio interface are completely top-notch. You'll be able to make rock-solid, album-worthy tunes with the Volt 276 in your studio.

Infuses your tracks with 610-style analog sound
UA is known for its traditional analog designs, and Volt 276 exemplifies that expertise. This audio interface has two analog mic/line preamplifiers that sound uncannily identical to Universal Audio's famous 610 tube preamplifier. The Vintage Preamp Mode on the Volt 276 uses skillfully built op-amps and solid-state circuitry to provide tube-like dynamic saturation and clipping, giving you strong, intuitive tone shaping for your microphones and line-level inputs. The best part is that Vintage Preamp Mode is configurable, allowing you to use the Volt 276 with external preamps and channel strips without adding coloring.
Includes a real-deal 1176-derived FET compressor
The UREI 1176 is a classic pro studio workhorse that can add punch and presence to everything from drums to guitars to voices. The Volt 276 has an integrated FET compressor based on the vintage 1176. However, this is not a digital simulation; rather, it is a genuine analog compressor. The compressor on the Volt 276 has three simple push-button modes for Vocals, Guitars, and Fast sources (the latter is designed specifically for drumming), providing appropriate settings for every source. The Universal Audio Volt 276 USB-C Audio Interface has no warranty.

product_name: JBL Live Flex 3
description:
JBL Live Flex 3

The JBL Live Flex 3 true wireless earbuds redefine personal audio with a premium blend of high-performance sound, smart technology, and user-first design. Each earbud in the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds features a powerful 12 mm dynamic driver, delivering rich, lifelike audio across a wide frequency range of 20 Hz to 40 kHz, perfect for deep bass and crisp treble. With an impedance of 13 ohms and sensitivity of 100 dB SPL, the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds ensure loud and clear playback with minimal distortion. These JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds also come equipped with Hi-Res Audio support and JBL Spatial Sound, creating a dynamic, theater-like listening experience. A key highlight of the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds is the True Adaptive Noise Cancelling technology, powered by four smart microphones that adjust in real-time to block out external noise. The JBL Headphones App allows users to customize ANC levels based on ear shape using its built-in compensation filter. For calls, the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds feature six beamforming microphones with advanced noise and wind suppression, ensuring your voice remains crystal clear. Voice equalizer, personal sound amplification, and ambient sound controls give you full command over both incoming and outgoing audio quality. Connectivity is seamless with Bluetooth 5.3 in the earbuds and Bluetooth 5.1 in the Smart Charging Case, supporting features like multi-point connection and Google Audio Switch for hassle-free transitions between Android devices. The Google Finder function helps locate misplaced earbuds via an Android network, adding convenience to your daily routine. Built tough with an IP55 rating, the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds are both dustproof and water-resistant, ideal for outdoor or active use. Battery life on the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds is impressive: enjoy up to 10 hours of playback ANC off, plus 40 additional hours from the charging case. With fast USB-C charging, just 10 minutes gives 4 extra hours, and the case also supports wireless charging. The Smart Charging Case not only powers the earbuds but also allows you to manage settings like volume, EQ, and call control directly from its screen. You can even customize its display with personal photos for added flair. Thanks to Personi-fi 3.0, users can shape their audio based on hearing preferences, while the JBL Headphones App offers full control over gesture behavior, ambient sound, and voice assistant selection. Compact, feature-rich, and stylish, the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds offer everything from cinematic audio to personalized control, making them the ultimate all-in-one audio solution for any lifestyle.

Hi-Res Audio Wireless with JBL signature sound

The JBL Live Flex 3 offers a premium Hi-Res Audio Wireless experience, combining advanced acoustic engineering with JBL’s legendary Signature Sound. Featuring precisely tuned 12mm dynamic drivers, these earbuds deliver deep, punchy bass, a well-balanced mid-range, and smooth, refined high frequencies, ensuring rich, full-spectrum sound at any volume level. Whether you're listening to music, watching movies, or taking calls, the sound remains consistently dynamic and immersive. Enhanced with JBL Spatial Sound technology, the JBL Live Flex 3 creates a wide, three-dimensional soundstage that surrounds you from every direction—making you feel as if you're right in the center of a concert hall or live performance. This truly elevates the way you experience audio, delivering JBL’s iconic sound quality at its very best.

product_name: Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone
description:
Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone

The Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone is a premium over-ear audio solution designed for both audiophiles and everyday users seeking high-quality wireless sound. Powered by Dual Noise Sensor Technology and Sony’s advanced Integrated Processor V1, the Sony WH-CH720N Bluetooth Headphone delivers a rich, immersive listening experience by effectively cancelling ambient noise across various environments. Featuring a compact yet powerful 30 mm dynamic driver unit, it reproduces clear and vibrant audio with a frequency response range of 7 Hz to 20,000 Hz (JEITA) and supports Bluetooth® communication at 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz (sampling frequency 44.1 kHz). The headphone's impedance measures 325 ohms at 1 kHz when powered on and 31 ohms when powered off, while sensitivity reaches up to 108 dB/mW when active and 99 dB/mW in passive mode, ensuring excellent audio performance in both wired and wireless modes. Engineered for long listening sessions, the Sony WH-CH720N Headphones are impressively lightweight at just 192 grams, with plush ear cushions and an ergonomic design that prioritizes comfort. It supports passive operation, DSEE (Digital Sound Enhancement Engine) for restoring compressed music, and includes Ambient Sound Mode, allowing users to stay aware of their surroundings—a valuable feature for commuting or outdoor use. With Bluetooth version 5.2, the headphone ensures fast, stable connections within a 10-meter range, supporting popular profiles such as A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, and HSP and audio codecs like SBC and AAC, along with SCMS-T content protection for secure wireless streaming. The Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone also shines in battery performance, offering up to 35 hours of continuous music playback with Noise Cancelling (NC) turned on, and an extended 50 hours with NC off. For calls, it supports up to 40 hours of continuous communication time (NC off), making it ideal for work, travel, or daily use. Recharging is simple and efficient with USB charging that takes approximately 3.5 hours for a full battery. For added flexibility, the headphones come with a 1.2-meter single-sided detachable cable and a gold-plated L-shaped stereo mini plug, ensuring excellent wired connectivity when needed. Finished in stylish color options—Black, White, Blue, and Pink—the Sony WH-CH720N Bluetooth Headphone strikes the perfect balance between innovative technology, comfort, long-lasting power, and signature Sony audio quality. Whether you're working, traveling, or relaxing, the Sony WH-CH720N offers everything you need in a modern wireless headphone.

Dual Noise Sensor Technology

Experience uninterrupted listening with the Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone, featuring advanced Dual Noise Sensor technology and the powerful Integrated Processor V1 for next-level noise cancellation. Whether you're commuting or relaxing, two microphones in each earcup work to capture and block ambient noise, allowing your music to take center stage. With the Sony | Headphones Connect app, you can fine-tune ambient sound across 20 levels, letting you control how much of the outside world you let in. Lightweight and comfortable with long battery life, the WH-CH720N lets you listen smarter, longer, and without distractions.

product_name: MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI mATX Motherboard
description:
MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI mATX Motherboard

MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI Motherboard supports 12th/ 13th Gen Intel Core, Pentium Gold, and Celeron processors for LGA 1700 socket. It comes with four dual-channel RAM slots, and two M.2 slots allowing you to take advantage of the full power of 13th & 12th generation Intel processors. The four SATA III ports allow users to create large storage drive arrays for large file libraries. Two PCIe x16 and one PCIe x1 slot allow you to install high-end graphics cards and other expansion cards. Connect to a wireless network with Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) technology, or make a wired connection with the integrated 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet port. Resource-demanding peripherals such as storage drives can be connected to the USB 3.2 Gen 2 and Gen 2x2 ports to quickly transfer data with enhanced speeds. USB 2.0 ports are also available for lower-powered devices such as mice and keyboards. Wireless peripherals such as headphones and controllers can be connected thanks to integrated Bluetooth 5.3 technology. This motherboard is compatible with both Windows 10 and Windows 11 (64-Bit).

Enhanced Power Design

MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI motherboard is designed for gamers and enthusiasts, with a 12+1 Duet Rail Power System with P-PAK, 8-pin + 4-pin CPU power connectors, Core Boost, Memory Boost technology, which boosts the performance of your multi-core Intel processor. Overclock your CPU with ease thanks to MSI Game Boost technology, which allows for 1-second rapid overclocking. The Digital Power Design, Overvoltage Protection, Load-Line Calibration, Double Power Connectors, and Supplemental PCIe Power Connectors on the motherboard all work together to provide proper electrical management through your system to stabilize your system, especially under high loads.

Premium Thermal Solution

The 14th Gen Motherboard features an Extended Heatsink Design and M.2 Shield Frozr and is designed for high-performance systems and continuous operation. This motherboard's increased cooling capabilities will keep your components working at optimal temperatures. M.2 Shield Frozr, Fully Fan Control, Frozr AI Cooling, and System Cooling all work together to keep your components cool even while under high loads when gaming or generating content.

High-Quality PCB for Enhanced Protection

The MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI 14th Gen Motherboard features a PCB optimized for higher bandwidth and faster transfer speeds, as well as reliable circuit transmission with 2oz thickened copper that allows the motherboard to easily withstand overclocking while improving heat dissipation and system reliability. The MSI PCI Express Steel Armor slot is soldered to the motherboard to handle the weight of large graphics cards and avoid GPU droop, which can damage PCIe slots. The grounding layer around the mounting holes is doubled for double ESD protection, preventing static discharge spikes from damaging the motherboard.

Lightning Fast Connectivity

Connect to your network wirelessly using Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) technology, which provides faster wireless rates and efficiency, making it ideal for uploading and downloading large files. This motherboard also has a 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet connection for wired networking. MSI's LAN Manager software prioritizes your connection, eliminating lag and maintaining a pleasant online experience.

product_name: LG UltraGear 27GN60R 27" FHD 144Hz IPS Gaming Monitor
description:
LG UltraGear 27GN60R 27" FHD 144Hz IPS Gaming Monitor

The LG UltraGear 27GN60R 27 Inch FHD 144Hz IPS FreeSync Gaming Monitor is suited for practically any task, whether you're watching movies or generating professional material. This 27" monitor supports a 1920 x 1080 FHD resolution and features an IPS (In-Plane Switching) HDR10 panel that shows 16.7 million colors covering 99% of the sRGB spectrum for vivid and realistic colors. It also has AMD FreeSync technology built-in, which helps to reduce stuttering, screen tearing, and motion blur during fast-action games when connected to a compatible graphics card. Other features include a 300 cd/m² max brightness, a 1000:1 contrast ratio, wide 178° horizontal and vertical viewing angles, and a 1ms gray-to-gray response time. Devices may be linked to the display through its DisplayPort and one HDMI ports, and there is a 3.5mm audio connector for connecting speakers or headphones to enjoy your films and music. The 100 x 100mm VESA mounting holes allow you to mount the monitor to a wall, a monitor arm, or a multi-monitor stand for maximum comfort. Built for gamers, it delivers the latest hardware, specs, ergonomics, sleek design and sensory experience. With gaming-focused features like 1ms GTG response times, pro-level customization and fast, vivid IPS panels, you're sure to gain an added edge.

HDR10 with bright color coverage

LG UltraGear 27GN60R lets you view HDR10 content at a brightness of 300 nits. HDR10 enhances the color of HDR material while providing a dramatic visual experience and improved image quality. This is combined with the P3's broad color coverage of 90%. There is a noticeable variation in color and brightness.

Easy on the Eyes

Reader Mode reduces the amount of blue light emitted while the Flicker Safe technology reduces the onscreen flicker level to almost zero, allowing you to work comfortably over long periods.

AMD FreeSync

Reduce screen tearing with AMD's FreeSync Technology. FreeSync enables the monitor to dynamically adjust its refresh rate to the frame rate being output by the graphics card, thereby greatly reducing screen tearing, stuttering, and other artifacts.

Designed for Incredible Speed

LG UltraGear 27GN60R 27 Inch FHD 144Hz IPS FreeSync Gaming Monitor comes with IPS 1ms comparable to TN Speed, providing the minimized afterimage and a fast response time, you can enjoy a whole new gaming performance. An ultra-fast speed of 144Hz allows gamers to see the next frame quickly and makes image to appear smoothly. The gamers can respond rapidly to opponents and aim at target easily.

Black Stabilizer

The LG UltraGear 27GN60R 27 Inch FHD 144Hz IPS Gaming Monitor Black Stabilizer adjusts the brightness during dark settings, allowing you to view details that might otherwise be obscured. Black Stabilizer is your ally to attack or defend against enemies hiding in the shadows. It delivers a pro-level gaming experience for enhanced vision and a jump on the competition.

product_name: Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds
description:
Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds

The Hoco EW60 Plus ANC True Wireless Earbuds are a powerful blend of cutting-edge technology and sleek design. Designed for those who demand both performance and style, these earbuds offer an array of features that elevate your listening experience to the next level. Whether you're using them for music, calls, or voice assistance, these wireless earbuds promise to deliver high-quality sound and versatile functionality. These earbuds have Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity, which ensures faster transmission, better stability, and reduced latency compared to older versions. This means smoother streaming, improved call quality, and less interference, even in environments with multiple wireless devices. The JL AC7003 chip works in tandem with Bluetooth 5.3 to enhance performance, providing a robust, high-fidelity audio experience that caters to both audiophiles and casual listeners alike.

Impressive Battery Life for Everyday Use

The Hoco EW60 Plus's battery life is a crucial component of wireless headphones. The charging case includes a 300mAh battery, and each earbud has a 30mAh battery. You should be able to use these earphones for the duration of your daily activities. The earphones themselves may be worn constantly for up to four hours on a single charge for lengthy meetings, workouts, or commutes. The charging case significantly extends this by offering many recharges before needing a plug. You can be certain that you'll always have power when you need it thanks to the earbuds' 150-hour backup duration. This extended battery life, combined with the portable design of the charging case, means you won’t need to worry about constantly recharging or running out of power. It’s an ideal feature for travelers or busy professionals who are always on the move and can’t afford downtime in their audio devices.

Active Noise Cancellation and Dual-Device Connectivity

The Hoco EW60 Plus delivers on this front. With its advanced ANC technology, these earbuds block out unwanted ambient noise, allowing you to focus on your music, podcasts, or calls without distractions. Whether you’re in a noisy office, commuting on a train, or walking through a busy city, the ANC feature will keep you immersed in your audio world. The Hoco EW60 Plus supports 2-in-1 functionality, enabling you to connect one earbud to two phones at the same time. This feature is particularly useful for users who manage both personal and work devices simultaneously. You can seamlessly switch between calls or audio from both phones without needing to disconnect and reconnect each time. It’s a truly efficient and convenient feature for multitaskers.

Smart Features for Seamless User Experience

With its noise-cancellation and multi-device connectivity, the Hoco EW60 Plus earbuds come with leader-follower switching, a feature that allows either earbud to function independently. This means you can use either the left or right earbuds as the primary unit, allowing for more flexibility in how you use them, whether you prefer to use just one earbud or both at the same time. Switching between music tracks is a breeze, and the earbuds are also compatible with Siri and other voice assistants, providing hands-free control. With just a simple voice command, you can make calls, send texts, or adjust your music, making these earbuds an excellent companion for users who prefer voice interaction over physical controls.

Compact Design, Perfect for On-the-Go

The Hoco EW60 Plus earbuds maintain a compact and lightweight form factor. Measuring 62.5 x 44 x 21.4 mm and weighing just 39.5 grams, these earbuds are both portable and comfortable. The ergonomic design ensures they fit securely in your ears, making them ideal for extended use during workouts, long calls, or travel. The minimalist design also adds a touch of elegance, combining practicality with a modern aesthetic that suits any occasion.
